name: skillboss
displayName: SkillBoss — The Wallet for AI Agents
description: Give your OpenClaw agent access to 354+ tools (100+ LLMs via Claude/GPT/Gemini/DeepSeek, web scraping, search, image/video/audio generation, email) through one API key with signed JWT audit trail. Free $0.50 trial, no signup. Implements Agent Shopping Protocol v0.1.

tools.name: skillboss_run
tools.description: Universal escape hatch — invoke any of the 354+ SkillBoss skills by id with a JSON inputs payload.

tools.name: skillboss_chat
tools.description: Call any of 100+ LLMs (Claude, GPT, Gemini, DeepSeek, Llama, Grok, Qwen, etc.).

tools.name: skillboss_web_scrape
tools.description: Fetch a URL and return cleaned markdown via Firecrawl.

tools.name: skillboss_web_search
tools.description: Live web search via Perplexity Sonar.

tools.name: skillboss_generate_image
tools.description: Generate an image from a text prompt (FLUX, Imagen, DALL·E).

tools.name: skillboss_send_email
tools.description: Send a transactional email via AWS SES.

tools.name: skillboss_get_balance
tools.description: Fetch the current SkillBoss wallet balance.

tools.name: skillboss_catalog_search
tools.description: Natural-language search over the 354-skill catalog — find a skill by intent instead of guessing model IDs.

disclaimer: SkillBoss is an independent multi-provider gateway and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by OpenClaw, Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, or any model vendor. All third-party product names and trademarks belong to their respective owners. See https://www.skillboss.co/legal/intellectual-property-policy for our full IP policy.
